db:select.doc:name: Select Stock + Thresholds
db:select.db:sql: SELECT ws.item_id, ws.location_id, ws.on_hand, ws.reserved, (ws.on_hand - ws.reserved) AS available, ws.last_updated_at, ws.source_system, th.safety_stock, th.critical_stock FROM warehouse_stock ws JOIN stock_thresholds th ON ws.item_id = th.item_id AND ws.location_id = th.location_id WHERE ws.item_id = :itemId AND ws.location_id = :locationId;

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json
var row = (payload default [])[0] default null --- if (row == null) { httpStatus: 404, errorCode: "INV-404", message: "No inventory found for itemId=" ++ (vars.itemId default "null") ++ " locationId=" ++ (vars.locationId default "null"), timestamp: now() as String } else do { var onHand = (row.on_hand default 0) as Number var reserved = (row.reserved default 0) as Number var available = ((row.available default (onHand - reserved)) default 0) as Number var safety = (row.safety_stock default 10) as Number var critical = (row.critical_stock default 0) as Number
var status = if (available <= 0) "OUT_OF_STOCK" else if (available <= critical) "CRITICAL_LOW_STOCK" else if (available <= safety) "LOW_STOCK" else "NORMAL"
--- { itemId: (row.item_id as String), locationId: (row.location_id as String), onHand: onHand, reserved: reserved, available: available, lastUpdatedAt: row.last_updated_at, sourceSystem: (row.source_system as String), safetyStock: safety, criticalStock: critical, stockStatus: status } }
